scope_boundary: Only the bounded Project Theseus artifact-retention replay-gate import moves to prototype-backed: a sanitized public-safe fixture records one local Theseus report with GREEN trigger state, one passed exact-hash retained-artifact replay, pointer/resolver/hash/JSON/defeater/compression-record verification, 41,943,527 replayed payload bytes, 2,389,576 archived bytes, one artifact-graph record, one proof-contract receipt, one storage evidence-transition record, zero public training rows, zero external inference calls, and seven expected-invalid controls. This does not promote the Project Theseus chapter core claim, deployed residual-ledger storage, deployed artifact-graph behavior, clean live Project Theseus replay, model quality, benchmark performance, generation speed, safety, alignment, transfer, deployment readiness, or ASI.
transition_reason: The imported Theseus report records a real artifact-retention replay gate rather than only a proposed report shape: a retained artifact pointer was followed, its archive payload was decoded, the decoded payload SHA-256 matched the expected payload SHA-256, the payload parsed as JSON, the defeater was verified, and the result emitted artifact-graph, proof-contract, claim, storage-transition, and defeater records. The ASI Stack repository validates only a sanitized public-safe summary, so the support movement is limited to the non-core import claim and remains prototype-backed rather than empirical-test-backed or chapter-core evidence.
required_artifacts: sanitized public-safe Theseus artifact-retention replay fixture
negative controls for hash mismatch, private-payload copying, training-row leakage, hard-gap erasure, and support overclaim
negative_results: public training row leakage is rejected
missing chapter-core non-claim boundary is rejected
no Project Theseus chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: the sanitized fixture no longer validates against the recorded source report digest, replay hash, redaction boundary, or exact replay counts
a hash mismatch, private payload copy, training-row leak, hard-gap erasure, or support overclaim is accepted as valid

the imported report is described as clean live Project Theseus replay, deployed residual-ledger storage, deployed artifact-graph behavior, benchmark performance, model quality, safety, ASI, or chapter-core evidence
future public dependency policy requires archived raw report publication and this record remains a digest-only sanitized summary
promotion_burden: Move beyond this bounded prototype-backed import only after a public-safe archived Theseus report bundle or clean live replay is available, raw-private payload publication boundaries are resolved, the replay command and environment are independently reproducible, artifact paths and payloads can be externally reviewed or intentionally redacted with reviewer acceptance, deployed residual-ledger or artifact-graph behavior is tested separately, residuals and non-claims are preserved, and independent review is recorded with a separate accepted transition.
limitations: raw Theseus report and private payloads are not copied into this public repository
